summary: PracticeAdminPage now provides a minimal inline metadata editor for the selected practice menu, using a dedicated practice_menus write helper in queries.ts while preserving practice runtime/store/menu/session/admin helper boundaries. Nullable normalization, selection-reset semantics, and previewBroken-based image preview handling are in place; tsc and build passed, and lint reported only the pre-existing useGameTick warning plus the pre-existing non-blocking Vite chunk-size warning.
